name: io.github.sangjun0000/stellar-memory
title: Stellar Memory
description: Persistent AI memory using orbital mechanics. 100% local, zero API keys, MCP-native.

environmentVariables.name: STELLAR_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: Active project name for memory isolation

tools.name: status
tools.description: View memories grouped by orbital zone

tools.name: commit
tools.description: Save session state (work, decisions, next steps, errors) to the Sun

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Search memories by content — matching results are pulled closer to the Sun

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store a new memory, auto-placed by type and impact

tools.name: orbit
tools.description: Recalculate all memory positions based on current importance

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Push a memory further from the Sun or soft-delete it

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Register and scan local directories as data sources

tools.name: daemon
tools.description: Start or stop the background scheduler for auto-decay and consolidation

tools.name: constellation
tools.description: Explore the knowledge graph between memories

tools.name: export
tools.description: Export memories as JSON or Markdown

tools.name: galaxy
tools.description: Manage projects: switch, list, create, stats, or mark universal memories

tools.name: analytics
tools.description: Memory analytics: health, topics, survival, or movements reports

tools.name: observe
tools.description: Extract memories from conversation text automatically

tools.name: consolidate
tools.description: Merge similar memories to reduce noise

tools.name: resolve_conflict
tools.description: List, resolve, or dismiss memory conflicts

tools.name: temporal
tools.description: Time-based queries: point-in-time recall, evolution chains, or bounds

resources.name: sun
resources.description: Current working context: project state, decisions, next steps, and core memories
